work.name: Bestow
work.summary: Staff Software Engineer promoted to Engineering Manager on the Enrollment Platform Core team; leading a Python/Flask platform team on GCP/Kubernetes.
highlights: Enabled multi-actor insurance applications (owner ≠ insured), delivering juvenile products for Transamerica and USAA including a live indexed universal life product.
Helped establish an external data service integration framework, building the attending physician statements integration and directing subsequent integrations for medical and prescription data.
Scoped a release tooling initiative to stabilize deployment processes and drove execution through three contractors; served as hiring manager for two roles.

work.name: Cabinet Health
work.summary: Backend engineer for an online pharmacy, using Python/Django.
highlights: Optimized API endpoints handling 10M+ provider and pharmacy records, reducing refill response times by 30%.
Implemented automated SMS/email notification system, increasing refill rates by 20% and reducing operational workload by 15%.

work.name: Songtrust / Downtown Music Publishing
work.position: Engineering Manager → Director of Software Engineering
work.summary: Joined as Senior Software Engineer; promoted through Engineering Manager to Director of Software Engineering. Led a Django/PostgreSQL web application with 30k+ active users and managed teams of up to 9 engineers.
highlights: Reactivated stalled business partnership impacting $2M of client earnings by completing a user identity verification initiative.
Reduced data record rejections from business partners by 95% through a custom ETL pipeline (Python/SQL) and improved data modeling.
Identified $35K/year in cloud cost savings; applied monitoring and alerting catching ~75% of user-facing issues before they were reported.

work.name: Bridgestone Commercial Solutions
work.position: Software Developer → Software Lead / Development Manager
work.summary: Built and led development of B2B commercial data collection and fleet inventory products using Django/PostgreSQL. Led a team of 8; product reached 600+ users and 3M+ survey readings.

education.area: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
